name: Mistakes to avoid after using Claude for legal strategy in Chicago?
description: No deleting, no solo use—lawyer direct everything.[1]

mainEntity.name: Mistakes to avoid after using Claude for legal strategy in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: No deleting, no solo use—lawyer direct everything.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Don't delete post-litigation (spoliation); no solo AI.[1][3] Share with counsel carefully.

**Key factors:**n- Preserve all.
- Lawyer direct only.
- Disclose AI use.

Switch to attorney; document switch. Comply court AI orders.[4] Learn from *Heppner*.[1]
